steps.detail: Spawned backend agent (sonnet/max) for tasks: f40d04219a80

task_snapshots.title: 369-03 — Governance Decision Logger
task_snapshots.description:
Implement governance decision logging in src/bernstein/evolution/governance.py. Create log_evolution_decision() function that records:
- cycle: integer cycle number
- timestamp: ISO 8601 timestamp
- weights_before: dict of previous EvolutionWeights
- weights_after: dict of current EvolutionWeights
- weight_change_reason: string explaining the adjustment
- proposals_evaluated: count of proposals reviewed
- proposals_applied: count accepted and applied
- risk_scores: list of numeric risk scores for each proposal
- outcome_metrics: dict with pps_delta, srs_delta, and other deltas

Output to .sdd/metrics/governance_log.jsonl with one JSON object per line. Validate JSONL format. Tests in test_governance.py: logging structure, JSONL parsing, concurrent writes, timestamp accuracy. All tests pass.

[subtask of 53e205b6e23e]
